shots.production_prompt: Split-screen composition. Left side: A lone figure stands at a literal crossroads in a misty landscape, two dirt paths diverging into fog, cool blue-gray lighting, uncertainty in their posture. Right side: The same figure steps forward decisively on the chosen path, warmer golden-hour lighting breaking through, shoulders back, head lifted. Camera holds steady on both frames. Transition lighting gradually—left side stays cool and hesitant, right side grows warmer and more confident as they move. Ambient sound: wind and gravel underfoot, subtle shift from minor to major key undertone. Duration 6-8 seconds. Slightly desaturated color grade, philosophical/contemplative mood.
